title: sign_and_verify uses RustCrypto p256 as independent oracle — correct test design
description: sign_and_verify_with_independent_oracle exports the TPM public key, signs a SHA-256 digest on the TPM, then verifies with RustCrypto p256 (a completely separate implementation). This proves TPM output is standards-compliant, not merely self-consistent. A future contributor might add a simpler sign+TPM-verify test; that test proves nothing additional and should not replace this one.
